default.name: Federal Trade Commission
default.description: Report deceptive business practices, consumer fraud, and antitrust violations

default.name: Securities and Exchange Commission
default.description: Report securities fraud, corporate misconduct, accounting fraud

tax.name: IRS Whistleblower Office
tax.description: Report significant federal tax underpayment, evasion, or fraud involving substantial amounts

environmental.name: Environmental Protection Agency
environmental.description: Report environmental violations, pollution, illegal dumping

labor.name: National Labor Relations Board
labor.description: Report union suppression, illegal labor practices, worker retaliation

labor.name: Department of Labor — Wage and Hour
labor.description: Report wage theft, overtime violations, child labor

labor.name: Occupational Safety and Health Administration
labor.description: Report workplace safety violations and worker hazards

financial.name: Department of Justice
financial.description: Report criminal corporate conduct, bribery, corruption

food_safety.name: Food and Drug Administration
food_safety.description: Report food safety issues, product contamination, labeling fraud
